task.title: Split spawn lifecycle hooks into separate doc rows

events.content: Split spawn lifecycle hooks into separate rows: Split spawn lifecycle hooks into separate rows

raw.question: Split spawn lifecycle hooks into separate rows
raw.chosen: Split spawn lifecycle hooks into separate rows
raw.reasoning: onStart, onSuccess, and onError are distinct hooks with different timing semantics, so combining them into one table row makes the reference harder to scan and weakens the docs as an option lookup.

retrospective.summary: Split lifecycle hook rows in spawn options docs
